emails.subject: 02/00 NATURAL GAS NOMINATION
emails.body: Lee, As Sitara currently stands, 500 of the 10,000 for EGP Fuels will be at Gas Daily. See deals 139066 and 139068.\ D Forwarded by Daren J Farmer/HOU/ECT on 01/25/2000 05:25 PM Michael Mitcham@ENRON 01/25/2000 04:59 PM
